name: figures
identity: A group of captors and guards escorting the player character through a dense forest. They are described as efficient and practiced in their movements, wearing furs, and maintaining a tight grip on the player.
current_status: Urgently escorting the player character through a denser, colder part of the forest toward a visible camp with lean-tos and a bonfire.

volatile_state.current_activity: urging the player forward toward a camp

notes: The specific faction name or origin is not yet revealed; currently referred to only as 'figures' or 'captors'.
